generated_oml:
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
instance ModelGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deployable DT artifacts generated via MDE"
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for real-time monitoring of building systems"
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for infrastructure optimization through predictive analytics"
]
instance DecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for stakeholders during design, operation, and refurbishment"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visual interface for monitoring system states and infrastructure operation"
]
instance DataExchangeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Capability for real-time data exchange and synchronization"
]
instance ActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote actuation of lighting systems and other building components for dynamic infrastructure adjustments",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ModelGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating deployable DT artifacts from enriched BIM models",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelGenerationInsight
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing data-driven insights for infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]
instance DecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enhanced decision-making capabilities throughout building lifecycle",
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionMakingInsight
]
instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service providing immersive interfaces for monitoring and operating infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance RealTimeDataExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time data exchange and synchronization between physical assets and digital twins",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataExchangeInsight
]
instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for remote actuation of building systems including lighting",
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuationAction
]
instance MDEProcess : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for automatically generating deployable DT artifacts from enriched BIM models",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelGenerationService
]
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time data exchange",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataExchangeService
]
instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto middleware for real-time data exchange",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataExchangeService
]
instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric model of the building",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEProcess
]
instance BCSSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic representation of Building Control Systems (BCS) components including sensors, actuators, and controllers",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEProcess
]
instance PostOccupancySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor data transmission for continuous synchronization between physical and digital assets",
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingPostOccupancySensor
]
instance BuildingPostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor configured within BIM model to capture post-occupancy data for building assets",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]
instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from physical building",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PostOccupancySensorDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting systems as part of Building Control Systems (BCS)"
]
instance ModularArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for supporting multiple digital twin instances"
]
instance CentralizedFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized framework coordinating multiple digital twin instances"
]
instance BuildingControlEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for Building Control Engineers performing device modeling"
]
instance FacilityManagerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for Facility Managers handling real-time monitoring and control"
]
instance DTEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for DT Engineers extending analytics services"
]
instance AECOEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain environment for building management",
    base:contains ModularArchitecture, CentralizedFramework, BuildingControlEngineerRole, FacilityManagerRole, DTEngineerRole
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals are transmitted from the digital twin to Building Control Systems (BCS) via bidirectional communication mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework orchestrates component integration via coordinated roles (Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers) and modular architecture, facilitating bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, transformation of enriched BIM models into structured representations via Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for automatic artifact generation, real-time data exchange for synchronization with physical infrastructure, interactive visualization for Facility Manager monitoring and control operations, and modular extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom services for evolving functionality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric, which quantifies the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart to ensure accurate representation of real-world conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware facilitate bidirectional data exchange between physical and virtual assets."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems through BIM-based data exchange and tools for device modeling, addressing interoperability across heterogeneous systems as specified in nonfunctional requirements (NF_X)"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework standardizes BIM semantics for Building Control System (BCS) components to address BIM's limitations, adhering to AECO-specific standards. Standardized integration frameworks and extension points ensure interoperability and compliance with industry specifications for DT deployment."
]
